results.title: OpenClaw Memory Architecture
results.snippet: OpenClaw memory design uses progressive disclosure with a durable markdown memory layer and hybrid retrieval.

results.title: OpenClaw Temporal Retrieval Notes
results.snippet: Temporal decay and hybrid ranking are used to surface recent context while retaining durable facts.

results.title: OpenClaw Memory Flush
results.snippet: A memory flush step consolidates relevant findings into a durable summary for later recall.
